metadata.title: Nailing a Sneaky Mid Peek for a Clean 2v1 in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a quick mid peek that catches enemies off guard with smooth aim and timing. How do you handle those tight duels in VALORANT? Share your thoughts!

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutchplays
